name: Puerto Rican Rice and Beans
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Roma Italians tomatoes, undrained, 28 oz each
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the pork from Puerto Rican Roast Pork in hot oil in a Dutch oven.
2. Add onions, garlic, and jalapenos to the pot and cook for about 10 minutes.
3. Stir in the tomatoes and cook until they release their juices.
4. Add garbanzo beans and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
5. Stir in the raw rice and black pepper, then cook for 25 minutes until most of the liquid is absorbed.
6. Mix in cilantro, oregano, diced red pepper, and drained black beans.
7. Serve hot.
